author: Wright 2020
notes:
1. Baseline imbalance on primary outcome: BDI exp 18.0 (SD=6.9) vs ctrl 16.0 (SD=6.6); no baseline adjustment in multilevel model.

2. High attrition: 4-month analysed n=42/70 (exp) and 44/69 (ctrl); 12-month analysed n=38/70 (exp) and 37/69 (ctrl). No ITT with imputation; mixed model included only participants with data at ≥1 post-randomisation timepoint.

author: Rohde 2015
notes: K-SADS 16-item composite (study-specific 4-point averaged scale); MI imputed means (20 datasets, Rubin's rules); N reported = randomized N per Table 1 note.
